global_description: A medium-sized duck with a rounded body and a distinctive iridescent green head. The male features a bright yellow bill and a white ring around its neck. The body is primarily gray with a chestnut-brown breast and black tail. Females are mottled brown with an orange bill.

part_details.head: Glossy, iridescent green with a smooth texture.
part_details.bill: Bright yellow in males, orange in females, slightly flattened.
part_details.neck: White ring separating the head from the body.
part_details.body: Gray with a mix of black and white patterns, rounded shape.
part_details.tail: Short, black with a slight upward curl.

spatial_relations: The iridescent green head sits atop the white-ringed neck.
The bright yellow bill extends forward from the head.
The chestnut-brown breast transitions into the gray body.
The black tail is positioned at the rear of the body.
